---
title: Card
sidebar: components
appPreview:
  file: components/layout/cards/app-preview.py
  static: true
listing:
- id: example
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-example.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/cards/
  contents:
  - title: Preview
    file: app-detail-preview.py
    height: 400
  - title: Express
    file: app-express.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXLOAD3QM4rVsk4x0pBhWTCIAEzgMiAV04AdCBKkzkMKBXQAbUhWOcARjlwmzyKGJMUtWgO6cK7ZOqzEoDAoAFHSqxsYA+qzEwtQAvAAqDKpwROxwnADm7BRxGmAAzACsAAzo--A+ZiCOMo7FYRFNIiIBgYZ2UcSJpAZFggcA8Ci8cSjfYHDCLpbi1uQZFMDCHrCocGMlmMKSJ9YT4NTWCT4QiljgFDccGoQQY5MycCCMwgrdxHbrXdRnYcxnQdgoDiEosAKIg12kTdt13fc4EPBtT1Ya8IgoTwZiCfImU-YxcGQKYzTmN5LjoXFFzLN0SiIdA+jiR0jxFRssxQ-htivYxMLAbD2xIsiSzLejEKbZCKAiXA2J3TiCNmIIABIAGl60IZBSMoci6IYkVT0yBhOGCJIUhTACgJAsDNJPJs0OIM4Ihox8YHzCTjHUn1zI2TN+Css58yYDE0PIOIrTcsZMzQ7JRO2XBSFUIEaIUGcsBKYK2mEChVAYdYk0yUEtGUsAKFsBAUHygQKDAABfA0gA
  - title: Core
    file: app-core.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXZTmdKQYVkAQUxEG1ACZwGRAK6cAOhH6DhyGFAroANqQp7OAIxy59h5FFbJ9FVaozoA+kuQBeZEpxQA5nAudHpK0gAUqshR3pxYxFAM4VEAxMgAPGmR0dk+8Yku7HBQsgxhKemZENnV0cpgAMpQenC2ACpSENJ1RMipGVk12cR6NqwuHnUmfgC00gkA1t3l-VWDAJQ9fZWDMVikCroHLpYUEWAndRvL24N0Cnp6LqzEUtQe7QpwmxUD1YWcfnYFAmYAAzABWAAM6AAHktej9VlE1tdVGtHBBVLI6Gw5AA3ORhbjoA5EfaHChEVgtVicchrRC-AACHRKOAMIgRK2y2LsHLCDNRSOqqQA4tQ5Do4GxYPppawmi1kHMKFBftkYOQKOxbF5gAByABSUAg+qI+oAYnATGbkPqALIJW368QMZ2O3DOw0KU0EdU7apG+7O0QKPzO+pwdDOgDyxAozoAcqQ8c6ACJwYj6gC6-qiCuauuQwAALOCiOCAExEEsADiIADYAIwV+vIBsAdiIHZb7YAnN2S9227Xq8ha7Xc5jhdk6ACiFAYZ4+RQsKwFCYTqwwnO-LSAF5wDxhLvIUFYcFrdEz6KL9mGMKayg6qmK1hEbQMeZyDz60i24wIDgAB3ThpG1Dwx0-
- id: relevant-functions
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-relevant-functions.ejs
  contents:
  - title: ui.card
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.card.html
    signature: ui.card(*args, full_screen=False, height=None, max_height=None, min_height=None,
      fill=True, class_=None, **kwargs)
  - title: ui.card_header
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.card_header.html
    signature: ui.card_header(*args, container=..., **kwargs)
  - title: ui.card_body
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.card_body.html
    signature: ui.card_body(*args, fillable=True, min_height=None, max_height=None,
      max_height_full_screen=None, height=None, padding=None, gap=None, fill=True,
      class_=None, **kwargs)
  - title: ui.card_footer
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.card_footer.html
    signature: ui.card_footer(*args, **kwargs)
- id: variation-toolbar-header-footer
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/cards/
  contents:
  - apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-toolbar-header-footer-preview.py
      height: 250
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-toolbar-header-footer-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-qMBioZBM8vdSSmTgCQ2Ay+ql+-wB-k45FScIgEhkTzQDCY1m4OSYLSqez+BxhyC80MOUxO81cFwgVxudwoDyehKJATeG24cAZ6mk3ChzJZyCBII2AGVORRubzCKSAYiEeIpNJUdIogxqgSWSSIM8puhUR1lt1eshSHRkABFAAsymWBmQ+RayhUpExyFaACYAMwAUj4EGI+mScD9yH0kmoZmDZAErjgbmKpAtnqw1R1Tj1GQAwmZuDN4Aw3cQAI4WHoS8jIMi53gxANRDnxzK4ZAARgArN6iBV2Alg-oqJR2BWGM07cYmOHG82ABzelN7Kz8iYhFzuMR0WZUOL7F7L8mzSnb3z8l7705Uy7XW73chMgWs94ZNwuiAJUjRPn3-xC0GNF9v6JkCaFpPy-OVEWRJUn3-d83HVGU6i1Fkz0PCR0CgYhYm8BCAhQs5qVpa8GVvHDXkfMAdCGUD7x-DYAFFdCEXYNTArh5XISDUToHs4BySimPgk8jiQok8IvGkr3pRlSLGNkMlUWNqIFWiMhFFRFOlISYVUF0xFogAVBhIxY+9wIVFF5PU-QcggUgYilLwTIBLVCFQChcHQBAUDAEoKDAABfABdIA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-toolbar-header-footer-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZOqASzIgGdl2Z0pBhT5cA+twBuAcwA6ERs2TcAFuwi4+AoSICCmIgFd28+RnRjjyALzJjOKNLhi6AG2MATABTzkfu+xYxFAM3r7+EfbBoWIqcFAecAw+EBFp-rJgACJQFFDIutCuuNzsvABKcILCmQTh6ZGBFKSkrgBGISkN3QFYza0dDGLq6IYUYm1jzRBdPXPsHtaZDHCMcKq19XMNrlBtcK5LYJVrG4Rb22mc5NbXEBIyPmgMTADu3AC0THlUmQCUdVSl38AIu23s-XaIWGEFG40mFGms2BV0WmW4cER6mk3E2QJREV2+0OmQAypiKNjced8QS-HdbuIpNInk4Qv9AXTQbTLlBXOxpBAjgwBSoKHjLtzLsRdtxuGIjm1pB8PCEANbIKgADwoH1eal+YDBfilDSiIQ8E1IHlwyJ69nQT0KfJKZWQpDoyAAigAWZR89bIVV5ZQqUjvZD5ABMAGYAKR8CDEFZQDGJ5ArSTUQxwZBkAQhOAeTWkb0xrAc41pB1PADChm4zXgDEjxAAjsZSpTyHnSI3eIlk-EMcW2poAIwAVjjRH17FcuZWVEo7B7DFygf46CYWdHmgAHHGK2BTelT9XAtFLXQWlRklXGn0WlD7zzwU1n4MYXCJlNyHa6QWI4PHDCBXFIBIJTpfwiQOI4slA8CEmQHI8ig6DRBuO4HhZTIQNeMCII8Ss3zmc9LghT9oW4dAoGIJIvHI98nwGaERjGX9EX-B9tiAzI4C1apxRpDC-FgkkwAAUUEnR0OghlsOZJ46HnOAPgEoSSK5TkCUo1ihnY+E-xmHj5jRMBVELOS6XEo5SRUKyRNE1RwzEWyABUGBzHSMIUplHnRByVg+CBrXWLSCSYs8fLSP4tjiiAEtMCBEk9DEGCzZJDKIUgxjhIgMTlVdEsQLZaLlZKzEwGwCkwLxzEsdgCqSTKEsIVAKFwdAEBQMBtQoMAAF8AF0gA
- id: variation-multiple-cards
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/cards/
  contents:
  - apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-multiple-cards-preview.py
      height: 500
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-multiple-cards-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-multiple-cards-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQEsZ1SAnC5dKCAEygGdk+7LgB0IAM2akYyXgAs6EXMgZNWyAIKYizalzjMiAVzqjRGdAH1jyALzJjOKAHM4FsQBtjXABSjk-+zosdyhcUkMKCzJPGAheXwgApMCsYihmHz9k7Ic0jItZOCg9ZgTs8oDhMABlKHc4fgARKAooKoIsipygilJSdwAjdLKu0Yde--gKPVFRZcZADJQATgAbABSZCkABu+mQfeQMHIUIDdfWjc0zCOMk+ibgnagyCojBY6SUXDo6Az5Ub1QokggTmQOjIY6rykSAFlQgJuMgAFKGCBm+ejRsAMKGMwOiUNuEoAFZwCsLBKLwhhOC4vD+sgZCUAopqdk4kiJgiEAntkmbNK09joKKG4oF+P7IAATAADDRAAsmYEckaYqqx6p-skWo6rwbYGsaprmqqASMoytZ6GIMj6Pe3izBERBCopMm8Lw+wQDSiDnAAAqBJRYKKUDipK5xSTIzYKlASpSlp5pGbYQhYMRUAAGISvA3ggKxVQ5pIXCGCsVQoP8YDonQXAuGw6gYhFUXIAAQrFkVwGwAHJfFjQZalyBIlUeI+fcjwacFyChRCrDQoQoI1PCVVEFUKLIRiWKIhVCK4kGXSws2pXAAAjAArBY9F0UQ-U0RYAAcdFjcgPYWINs3jf1FgAMzLcgU0WAA7LNBXcUkVQAOI4R1IVVAA1BNA6IpdU23dVV2DY9DVgNddGvTVl1rY9OLmgAvhJ3F0NJCkUFguwaYcxzOjSyAAIR2OSwJIKxDl2EZwBY1UDxPPhuK2HY4OQ8VBxiEcJzeDS-34dxOgUMBiRGbWZiYI5mjoN45hWHQRCLMw96MtVYAULg6AICgotwAAHhQYAAziQA
- id: variation-filling-plot
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/cards/
  contents:
  - apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-filling-plot-preview.py
      height: 500
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-filling-plot-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXLOAD3QM4rVsk4x0pBhWQBXTkWEQAJnAYAdCBKkzkMKBXQAbUhWOcARjlwmzyKGJMUtWgO6cK7eZyzEoDCoAFOxwnADm7BQAvBpgACwADIno-HFEdHLGxgD6rMTC1NEAKgxycACUiFrItT5+ASo5oVBqDEFxAMpQxiLIpdQqcRWuEHXIAALKbTimLmN1anTIdhRBVTXjdQDEyADi1OqGcGywJicqhlCbW-
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-filling-plot-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-gMUgBiZAAcWoch0cDYsH0WOkOigCOiMHIFHYti8wAA5AApKAQKlEKkAMTgJkZyCpAFkEhyqeIGHyebg+TSFAyALpEqKsYqlTzIYATACsRGVACYiBMABxEABsAEY1brkHqAOxS86QlZ0YZEKBzBX2LCsBQmLqsMK2vw-ABecA8YRNetqZxWUQdYMMYRJlHJnzlrCI2gYAGs5B4qaQOcYIHAAO6caRkjyarQJdMMP0Bk1kAwMTOsKhwPQmEJwKlh8ORr4UFwUThGOD5Lmk9h6XhFErlEF9aXWOYuuB9uZ6KAmFsjsdz61NHvLly4NcbvT5KfysIAEgA0ic6vPI34GEWwgc4Pa9Oh2FAPFMsABmLsVikCgFAYZZvQuJxMAVcR0DCZw3E4T47jkM5CFQCgLAQFAwCoOYKDAABfCUgA
- id: variation-tabbed-card
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-example.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/cards/
  contents:
  - title: Preview
    file: app-tabbed-card-preview.py
    height: 250
  - title: Express
    file: app-tabbed-card-express.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#
  - title: Core
    file: app-tabbed-card-core.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-WFaeGbfwWMCifxxZBmAAyUJMCUKfx+sLhugxnCxACFSPt8QAROClQykdC+UlgcmU6xo6lYTEXdykQws8acHTZBg8vnghW-E75QGRLKglH5Jr8HIBGHgwoAZVWwhQAClZpJ3LxFgAGRYANgNpy0h2OWoKYAAogAPLk9OAmZBkARjCiccgWyTZZD2p0u0JK0IRihjNSFAAKnW6ImZ-XY+1I7hMieTdCRhiixBu1DUjQYkjgKqs7Dg0vYFAzYAGdrt6F931J8hHPjobDK8W46EkFCIpFnM7nE9YrEjEASiH+MVXcj30Ew6jEmDMihUnCITgYpTlckIqAouC5tDAVF9FDAAF8ALpAA
- id: variation-card-sidebar
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-example.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/cards/
  contents:
  - title: Preview
    file: app-card-sidebar-preview.py
    height: 425
  - title: Express
    file: app-card-sidebar-express.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-d7Y6aAL4ASn8ECSdGpyGsWGIUGYXFqYgmNt4xA01AKo2YhjgRFkcDo9tkFAKrS9LoADOgVK0M4huQW6EWS1xra2oFwLLVWhULsxkGUMsgAKJqfmXLNm5q5-OF6JQXCkYzW3iYuAAIxLtRHY-NR9k46w1-n9+Yj9HB-NAHvgYl6DPcniLv+gFQbydwsNaYj7FQApfJBUEAUuiGpLeuDIHyLAzM+aHNGCACCsTQsaWqSrqRyynmhrPPqqpHE8GqcihRHNPunFNIWwEUFekzzj+rSSEkdJHP04nIBQpAODRRAhsg--y0HTqgUGAabvEAA
  - title: Core
    file: app-card-sidebar-core.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQEsZ1SAnC5dKCAEygGdk+7LgB0IAM2akYyXgAs6EXMgZNWyAIKYizOFGIU6ANzjbqXOMyIBXOqNEBiZAGEdUKgJkwoAG2-Ix3qQA7hbIPBR8cBSiAcEW--HwIeFDnG5PfZp+xYqfmVHJPdP996GWvoSnSlpLGa64fxXe6l8WwVZleklTk4R5Og+SJAUhVhFkjjFJU72-Ypuy-U8Ex3PdeE6Stq0kIJcRZeoCOQChSBkWRpWmJ1kFtZAjVQ+dkIwiBdzHPQDHITUp1HMiIDw55DnlQTojARjv3Eh9i3zbjSC4XBj2QooExHCg2M1cIoFTbJ4GrcoLE1CIpzlST71MvtzNVMQOi1XhiB0agElaZgrBMNDyzoXVZAoBJSgtI0AAZ0BbT8mIjCBwsjcwxBkCwyVyTCKCIVS2KIRpeAncgw0QLMAAEdG4CwsE07ScizaL-DrZhDKgYy8mytDHCfbwb2QV9kHfSomNVOgYsSrBOqvFqLFyMM4ySUo-28Ko0NVLgYqSfTmBebrimBRoctWhd5rjSq4mW4Alt4d5OqVcblFY0cBovaqxGfKsw3OSMT0cOYYAg5B8JWk8dAoAUVXmrByygDN+q+0bIqY-LdH0Iw4CwOAxDEQ88tcWHjAR4xKASy6KCwHRGgocK5sR5BNVGzaTwTKx0HCFNGgOfRq0Gu7htvWLGaoLhfLAKauzQ6nabcemcJG0ovp6QwfFchIGMjUQMHQXbNHQXJFZjOg0riixwumMAKFwe5aH1uAWwoMAQ3OIA
---

:::{#example}
:::

:::{#relevant-functions}
:::

## Details

A card is a rectangular container with borders and padding that groups related UI elements together.

To add a card to your app:

1. Add `ui.card()` to your UI.
2. Place UI elements inside the card as direct children, or use `ui.card_header()`, `ui.card_body()`, and `ui.card_footer()` to organize content into distinct sections.

If you don't use `ui.card_body()`, any direct children of `ui.card()` that aren't card items (like `ui.card_header()` or `ui.card_footer()`) are automatically wrapped in an implicit `ui.card_body()`.

### Card customization

Cards and card items accept Bootstrap utility classes for customization. Use the `class_` parameter to apply classes for [colors](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.2/utilities/background/), [text](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.2/utilities/text/), [borders](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.2/utilities/borders), and more.

### Card size

By default, a card grows to accommodate its contents. Set the `height` or `max_height` parameter to control the card's size. If your card contains large amounts of text, tables, or other content, setting a `height` or `max_height` enables scrolling. When laying out [multiple cards](#variations), let the layout function determine the card heights rather than setting fixed heights.

Use `full_screen=True` to add an icon that expands the card to fill the browser window. Pair `max_height` with `full_screen=True` to provide an expansion icon. When users click the icon, the card fills the browser window. The `max_height` constraint only applies to the normal view, not the full-screen view.

### Filling layouts

Cards support filling layouts where outputs automatically resize to fit the available space. When a fill item like `ui.output_plot()` appears as a direct child of a `ui.card_body()`, it resizes to match the card's height. For example, setting `height="250px"` on a card reduces the plot's height from its default 400px to approximately 200px. When expanded to full-screen, the plot grows to match the card's new size.

:::{#variation-filling-plot}
:::

### Tabbed card {#tabbed-card}

Use `ui.navset_card_underline()` inside a card to create tabbed content.

:::{#variation-tabbed-card}
:::

### Card with sidebar {#card-sidebar}

Use `ui.layout_sidebar()` inside a card to create a card with a sidebar layout. This pattern is useful for cards that need input controls or filters alongside their main content.

:::{#variation-card-sidebar}
:::

### Multiple cards

Use `ui.layout_columns()` to arrange multiple cards in a multi-column layout. Cards in the same row automatically share the same height. See the variations below for examples of multiple-card layouts.

:::{#variation-multiple-cards}
:::

### Toolbars in cards

Add toolbars to card headers and footers to provide interactive controls. Use `ui.toolbar()` within a `ui.card_header()` or `ui.card_footer()` to create a compact row of buttons or inputs. Toolbars are particularly useful for actions like refreshing data, downloading reports, or accessing settings.

By default, toolbars align to the right. Set `align="left"` to position controls on the left side instead. Use `ui.toolbar_spacer()` and `ui.toolbar_divider()` to manipulate toolbar visual spacing.

:::{#variation-toolbar-header-footer}
:::
